title: Features to compare on bank websites
intro: Check each bank’s official security and product pages for card freeze, alerts, limits, and support — plans change.

items.reason: Large retail bank — on ING’s site, compare app login options, card controls, and how to reach fraud support for your account type.
Traditional Dutch bank — review ABN AMRO’s security centre for transaction alerts, device management, and how to report suspicious messages.
App-first bank — confirm how bunq handles card freezing, shared accounts, and notifications for the plan you are considering.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
